The integration uses Apple’s new MapKit for Automotive SDK and will launch with Ford’s $30,000 midsize electric pickup in 2027, according to a joint announcement from both companies on […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Musk says Optimus will be the hardest product Tesla has ever scaled https://thenextweb.com/news/musk-optimus-hardest-product-scale-manufacturing-tesla Thu, 23 Jul 2026 20:38:46 +0000 TheNextWeb=014df81b0bd4c7cd72a5112e2f4df0c0 Elon Musk told investors on Tesla’s second-quarter earnings call that Optimus will be “the hardest product to scale manufacturing that we’ve ever made at Tesla,” warning that the humanoid robot has no existing supply chain and that every component is new. He said he wanted to “calibrate people correctly” on expectations, acknowledging that the initial […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AMD unveils Helios rack and MI455X accelerator in bid to close the gap with Nvidia https://thenextweb.com/news/amd-advancing-ai-helios-mi455-cerebras-nvidia Thu, 23 Jul 2026 19:58:22 +0000 TheNextWeb=d3870236e426466e3bcabc43c01799fe AMD unveiled a suite of new data centre products at its Advancing AI event in San Francisco on Thursday, claiming they will outperform Nvidia’s competing hardware across AI training and inference. The provisional offer is £1.35 billion ($1.8 billion), […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Travis Kalanick raised $1.7B for his robotics comeback, and Uber chipped in https://thenextweb.com/news/travis-kalanick-atoms-1-7-billion-industrial-ai-a16z-uber Thu, 23 Jul 2026 17:33:39 +0000 TheNextWeb=8346b430b9600d22d02e4371b3f46d5a Travis Kalanick is back, and Uber is helping to fund him. Its co-founder Ben Horowitz is joining the board. Deployment of the first gigawatt begins in the first half of 2027. Publishers let Google crawl their pages. Google sent readers back in return. That bargain is breaking. Reddit is the latest, and loudest, sign.
